description: The Papalia are a powerful 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta originating from Platì, Calabria, Italy. They are heavily rooted in northern Italy, especially in the Milanese hinterland, with Buccinasco as their stronghold. Their main activities include drug trafficking (cocaine and heroin), extortion, and construction contract management. They have been involved in feuds and high-profile kidnappings, and many members have been arrested in operations like Nord-Sud and Duomo Connection.

country_links.evidence_quote: Johnny Papalia (18 marzo 1924 – 31 maggio 1997) , boss dei Papalia ad Hamilton in Canada ... Frank Papalia (1930 - 2014) , boss dei Papalia ad Hamilton in Canada .
country_links.context: The Papalia organization has a presence in Canada through its boss Johnny Papalia and Frank Papalia in Hamilton.

country_links.evidence_quote: un traffico di droga tra la Colombia e i paesi di Corsico, Assago, Buccinasco e Trezzano sul Naviglio riconducibile ai Barbaro-Papalia.
country_links.context: The Papalia organization traffics drugs from Colombia to Italy.

country_links.evidence_quote: Johnny Papalia ... capo-decina della Famiglia di Buffalo degli Stati Uniti
country_links.context: The Papalia organization is linked to the Buffalo Family in the United States through Johnny Papalia.
